MOVING PARTY FAILED TO CARRY THEIR BURDEN AND SHOW THAT THERE ARE NO TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT WITH COMPETENT ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED IN VIOLATION OF THIS COURT'S JULY 18, 2024 MINUTE ORDER IS STRICKEN. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF KRISTEN BARTOK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 23, 2024. NO LATER THAN JULY 31, 2024 PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE THEIR SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO MAY 21, 2024 ORDER. IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT BY JULY 31, 2024 THE ACTION WILL PROCEED BASED ON THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE TO REQUEST A NEW LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard Olsen for Steven Wang, Defendant (via Zoom).

Mr. Olsen contested the court's tentative decision. Mr. Olsen stated that the 30th day after notice was given fell on a Saturday and argued that his motion was timely pursuant to CRC 1.10. The court indicated that it would take the matter under submission for further review and advised Mr. Olsen that he may submit a brief with supporting authorities by close of business.

After discussion the court ruled as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment/Notice of New Hearing Date is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry their burden and show that there are no triable issues of fact with competent admissible evidence. Plaintiff's Second Amended Complaint filed in violation of this Court's July 18, 2024 minute order is stricken.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
